items.prompt: Describe the setting of Act I in 'Waiting for Godot' and its significance.
keyPoints: A country road with a single tree
Sparse and minimalistic setting
Reflects themes of desolation and existential uncertainty

markingCriteria.full: Includes all key points with accurate detail
markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail
